proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing millions each year on manual proposals. This is how it happens.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting each proposal involves hours. Now, generate them in 47 seconds with full personalization.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the ongoing losses Gmail faces due to current inefficiencies.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Each team member spends 10 hours weekly drafting proposals. That's over 500 hours lost monthly, not closing deals.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Manual proposal creation costs Gmail $200 per proposal. Annually, this scales to hundreds of thousands.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed responses lead to lost clients. Every delayed proposal means potential revenue slipping away.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Inconsistent proposals weaken Gmail's brand. Each mismatch costs potential customer trust and retention.

problems.title: Proposal Errors
problems.description: Human errors in proposals can cost Gmail valuable deals. Each mistake risks tarnishing Gmail's reputation.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Resources are drained by repetitive tasks. Every hour spent on proposals is an hour not innovating Gmail services.

proposal1.solutionIntro: This AI system is the solution to the inefficiencies outlined above.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Now, generate them instantly with complete branding in 47 seconds.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: High labor costs are a burden. With automation, reduce costs drastically while maintaining quality.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Brand mismatches are common. Ensure every proposal aligns perfectly with Gmail's branding.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Human errors are inevitable. Eliminate them with precise, AI-generated content every time.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Valuable resources are wasted on repetitive tasks. Free them for innovation with efficient automation.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Communication with Gmail's Intuitive Email Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Implement effective email strategies to improve internal communication and customer engagement, leveraging Gmail's 15 GB of storage and mobile access.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is losing valuable opportunities due to communication inefficiencies.

problems.title: Limited Email Storage
problems.description: Acme Corp is losing productivity as employees constantly manage their email quotas. With only 5 GB, vital information may be deleted prematurely.

problems.title: High Spam Volume
problems.description: Excessive spam is causing distractions and potential security risks. This leads to lost productivity as employees spend time filtering spam instead of focusing on core tasks.

problems.title: Lack of Mobile Access
problems.description: Without mobile email access, your team misses timely responses. This can result in delayed decision-making and lost business opportunities.

problems.title: Inefficient Collaboration
problems.description: Current tools do not support seamless team collaboration. This inefficiency results in lost time and missed deadlines, impacting project delivery.

problems.title: Email Security Risks
problems.description: Without advanced security measures, sensitive data is at risk. This exposes the company to potential data breaches and financial losses.

problems.title: Difficulty in Email Search
problems.description: Ineffective search capabilities lead to wasted time finding emails. This results in decreased productivity and frustration among employees.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these communication challenges.

solutions.title: Gmail's 15 GB Storage
solutions.description: Eliminate storage issues with Gmail's generous space. This allows your team to focus on their tasks without worrying about email quotas.

solutions.title: Spam Filtering
solutions.description: Our advanced spam filtering reduces unwanted emails. This helps your team maintain focus and enhances security.

solutions.title: Mobile Email Access
solutions.description: Enable your team to access emails on-the-go. This ensures timely communication and decision-making wherever they are.

solutions.title: Enhanced Security Features
solutions.description: Protect sensitive data with Gmail's security measures. This minimizes the risk of data breaches and financial exposure.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail offers intuitive email solutions trusted by millions worldwide.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Gmail is a trusted solution for millions, ensuring reliability and efficiency.

whyUsCards.title: Advanced Search
whyUsCards.description: Find emails quickly with powerful search capabilities, saving time and increasing productivity.

whyUsCards.title: Scalable Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our services grow with your business needs, providing flexibility and long-term value.

whyUsCards.title: Robust Security
whyUsCards.description: Protect your data with advanced security features, ensuring peace of mind.

socialProof.label: Businesses use Gmail for their communication needs.
Storage per user, more than most competitors.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the dedicated team ready to support Acme Corp.

team.name: there
team.bio: With over a decade of experience in email solutions, leads strategy and client relationships to drive success.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery and Planning
process.description: Analyze current communication systems and set objectives.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Deploy Gmail solutions tailored to Acme Corp's needs.

process.title: Review and Support
process.description: Ensure smooth operations and address any issues.
